name: USD Partners LP
summary: USD Partners LP (USDP) is a master limited partnership that provides terminalling services for crude oil and biofuels. The company operates terminal facilities where it offers storage and throughput services, primarily for crude oil. It serves customers seeking capacity at its terminals and generates revenue through terminalling service contracts with upstream producers, refineries, and related businesses.
